un.caen.model.items

Class Gun

  • java.lang.Object
    • un.caen.model.items.Item
      • un.caen.model.items.Weapon
        • un.caen.model.items.Gun

  • public class Gun
extends Weapon
    Represents a gun weapon in the game that can be used by players. The gun has a certain amount of ammunition and can apply damage to players.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Weapon

        damage, range

      • Fields inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Item

        id, ItemCount, position, visible

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Gun(int ammo, int ownerPlayerId, boolean visibleToAll)
      Constructs a Gun with the specified ammunition, owner player ID, and visibility setting.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void apply(Player player)
      Applies the gun's effect to a player by reducing their energy.
      int getAmmo()
      Gets the current amount of ammunition in the gun.
      int getOwnerPlayerId()
      Gets the ID of the player who owns the gun.
      boolean isVisibleToPlayer(int playerId)
      Checks if the gun is visible to a specific player.
      void use()
      Uses the gun, reducing the ammunition count by one.
      void use(Direction direction)
      Uses the gun in a specified direction (not implemented).
      void use(int x, int y)
      Uses the gun at a specified position (not implemented).

      • Methods inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Weapon

        getDamage, getRange

      • Methods inherited from class un.caen.model.items.Item

        getId, getNextPosition, getPosition, getPositionsAround, isVisible, setId, setPosition, setVisible

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Gun

        public Gun(int ammo,
           int ownerPlayerId,
           boolean visibleToAll)
        Constructs a Gun with the specified ammunition, owner player ID, and visibility setting.
        Parameters:
        ammo - the initial amount of ammunition for the gun
        ownerPlayerId - the ID of the player who owns the gun
        visibleToAll - true if the gun is visible to all players, false otherwise

    • Method Detail

      • isVisibleToPlayer

        public boolean isVisibleToPlayer(int playerId)
        Checks if the gun is visible to a specific player.
        Parameters:
        playerId - the ID of the player to check visibility for
        Returns:
        true if the gun is visible to the player, false otherwise

      • getOwnerPlayerId

        public int getOwnerPlayerId()
        Gets the ID of the player who owns the gun.
        Returns:
        the owner player ID

      • apply

        public void apply(Player player)
        Applies the gun's effect to a player by reducing their energy.
        Overrides:
        apply in class Weapon
        Parameters:
        player - the Player to apply the gun's effect to

      • use

        public void use(int x,
                int y)
        Uses the gun at a specified position (not implemented).
        Specified by:
        use in class Weapon
        Parameters:
        x - the x-coordinate where the gun is used
        y - the y-coordinate where the gun is used

      • use

        public void use()
        Uses the gun, reducing the ammunition count by one.

      • getAmmo

        public int getAmmo()
        Gets the current amount of ammunition in the gun.
        Returns:
        the current ammo count

      • use

        public void use(Direction direction)
        Uses the gun in a specified direction (not implemented).
        Specified by:
        use in class Weapon
        Parameters:
        direction - the Direction in which the gun is used
